issue_summary: Add a CharArrayMap<V> for performance improvements in some stemmers and synonym filters
javadoc_before: /** The Iterator for this set. Strings are constructed on the fly, so * use nextCharArray for more efficient access. */
javadoc_after: /** The Iterator for this set. Strings are constructed on the fly, so * use nextCharArray for more efficient access. * @deprecated Use the standard iterator, which returns {@code char[]} instances. */
